BgpPeerId.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^dxpeer-[a-z0-9]{8}$  
Update requires: No interruption

AuthKey.description: The authentication key for BGP configuration. This string has a minimum length of 6 characters and and a maximum length of 80 characters.
AuthKey.markdownDescription:
The authentication key for BGP configuration. This string has a minimum length of 6 characters and and a maximum length of 80 characters.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9\\!"#$%&'()*+,\-./:;<=>?@\[\]\^_`{|}~]{6,80}$  
Update requires: No interruption

AddressFamily.description: The address family for the BGP peer.
AddressFamily.markdownDescription:
The address family for the BGP peer.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^(ipv4)|(ipv6)$  
Update requires: No interruption

AmazonAddress.description: The IP address assigned to the Amazon interface.
AmazonAddress.markdownDescription:
The IP address assigned to the Amazon interface.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9a-fA-F:.]+/[0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

Asn.description: The autonomous system (AS) number for Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) configuration.
Asn.markdownDescription:
The autonomous system (AS) number for Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) configuration.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[1-9][0-9]*$  
Update requires: No interruption

---

Type: String

Update requires: No interruption

Tag.description: A key-value pair to associate with a resource.

Value.description: The value for the tag. You can specify a value that is 0 to 256 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.
Value.markdownDescription:
The value for the tag. You can specify a value that is 0 to 256 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Key.description: The key name of the tag. You can specify a value that is 1 to 128 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.
Key.markdownDescription:
The key name of the tag. You can specify a value that is 1 to 128 Unicode characters in length and cannot be prefixed with aws:. You can use any of the following characters: the set of Unicode letters, digits, whitespace, _, ., /, =, +, and -.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

ConnectionId.description: The ID or ARN of the connection or LAG.
ConnectionId.markdownDescription:
The ID or ARN of the connection or LAG.

---

Required: Conditional  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^((arn:aws[a-z-]*:directconnect:[a-z0-9-]+:[0-9]{12}:(dxcon/dxcon|dxlag/dxlag))|dx(con|lag))-[a-z0-9A-Z]{8,21}$  
Update requires: No interruption

AllocatePrivateVirtualInterfaceRoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the role to allocate the private virtual interface. Needs directconnect:AllocatePrivateVirtualInterface permissions and tag permissions if applicable.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[a-z-]*:iam::[0-9]{12}:role/.+$  
Update requires: Replacement

Update requires: Replacement
